Royal Quest
Gladiator's Fury Sword

When attacking, has a 20-22% chance of restoring 9-11% health in self.

Once in a while, the unit deals 200000 pure damage to all enemies in a small radius around themself. All enemies hit lose their balance for 4 sec. During this time they cannot dodge or make critical attacks. When the effects ends enemy fighters are stunned for 3 sec.

Requirements: 98-100
